title: Trump Signs EO Removing Regulatory Barriers to Affordable Housing
detail: President Trump signed an Executive Order directing EPA, Army Corps of Engineers, HUD, Commerce, and FHFA to review and revise stormwater, wetlands, and water-related permitting requirements that raise home construction costs. The order aims to streamline federal regulatory approvals, reduce building costs, and increase home insurability — framed as a supply-side answer to the US housing affordability crisis.

media.caption: Trump signs executive order removing regulatory barriers to affordable housing

title: Trump Issues 'Made in America' Executive Order on Origin Claims
detail: Trump signed an Executive Order directing the Federal Trade Commission to prioritize enforcement of deceptive 'Made in America' or 'Made in the USA' product claims and consider new regulations requiring online marketplaces to verify country-of-origin claims. The order targets foreign goods misrepresented as domestic products, tying into broader trade and economic nationalism themes of the administration.

media.caption: Trump issues Made in America executive order on origin claims
